field.name: project_document_link
field.placeholder: Paste Microsoft Teams channel link for project documents...

field.name: sales_handover_note
field.placeholder: Enter project handover details, scope, client expectations...

field.name: project_attachments
field.help: Upload project-related documents here. They will automatically sync to the project when confirmed.

group.div: Documents attached here will be automatically copied to the project when this sales order is confirmed.

div.style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); padding: 12px 20px; margin: 0px; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); padding-bottom: 8px;
display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap;
flex: 1; min-width: 180px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px;
flex: 1; min-width: 180px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px;
flex: 1; min-width: 180px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px;

xpath.attribute: Sales handover note will appear here automatically when the sales order is confirmed...

field.name: sale_attachment_ids
field.help: Documents attached to the original Sales Order. These are synced automatically when the order is confirmed.
